mega.helpText: Free consultation on the service that fits you best. Technical team available within 48h.
mega.similarProjectText: If you recognize a challenge similar to any of these cases, let's talk. We reply in under 24h with concrete next steps.

cookieBanner.title: Cookies & analytics
cookieBanner.body: We use analytics cookies to understand how the site is used and improve the experience. We don't use them for advertising or commercial profiling.

hero.heroBadge: We build software without vendor lock-in
hero.heroSubtitle: We migrate legacy systems, build custom platforms, and integrate applied AI — with code you own and an audited process from end to end.

home.heroTitle: Boost Your Business with Digital Transformation
home.heroSubtitle: We help companies modernize, automate, and grow efficiently.
home.howWeWorkSubtitle: Our rigorous and proven methodological process ensures not only the timely delivery of projects, but also maximum quality and results that exceed your expectations
home.step1Description: Contact us through our form or schedule a call. We listen to your needs, business challenges, and specific objectives to understand how we can help you.
home.step2Description: We conduct a comprehensive analysis of your current situation, identify improvement opportunities, and define measurable objectives aligned with your business strategy.
home.step3Description: We develop a tailored proposal including methodology, detailed timeline, resource allocation, required investment, and clearly defined success KPIs.
home.step4Description: We execute the project with constant communication, on-time deliveries, and continuous monitoring. We provide post-implementation support to ensure sustainable results.
home.servicesSubtitle: Explore our full range of custom digital solutions, designed to help your business modernize, automate, and grow
home.whyChooseSubtitle: Our rigorous methodology eliminates uncertainty, ensuring every phase of your project is executed with precision, quality, and punctuality
home.whyChoose1Text: We hand over the full source code, documented and free of any dependency on us. You can replace us tomorrow without losing anything.
home.whyChoose2Title: Audited process, not a leap of faith
home.whyChoose2Text: We validate against the original system before cutover — reproducible scenarios, field-by-field match. Decisions backed by data, not trust.
home.whyChoose3Text: No long selection process. Call today, first commit the day after. Same time zone, same language, zero ramp-up.

CTA.title: Your technical problem deserves an honest conversation
CTA.subtitle: We don't send a sales rep. We respond with an initial technical assessment — no strings attached.
CTA.trust3: Technical review, not a sales pitch

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Flexible technology solutions that drive your business forward

professionalWebsites.name: Corporate Websites
professionalWebsites.description: Fast, optimized websites designed to convert visitors into customers.
professionalWebsites.keywords: web development, professional websites, SEO, responsive design, business websites
professionalWebsites.whatWeDoText: We develop 100% custom corporate websites — no templates, no limits. Clean code, optimized architecture, and exceptional performance from day one. Every website is designed to elevate your brand and drive conversions.
professionalWebsites.benefitsSubtitle: Your website isn’t just a digital card — it’s your best salesperson, working 24/7.

benefitsList.title: Extreme Speed
benefitsList.description: Ultra-fast loading (Google PageSpeed 90+) that reduces bounce rates and boosts conversions. Every millisecond counts.

benefitsList.title: Built-in SEO
benefitsList.description: SEO optimization from the code itself — not as an add-on. Your website is ready to rank from day one.

benefitsList.title: Fully Responsive Design
benefitsList.description: Perfect on mobile, tablet, and desktop. Your site adapts seamlessly to every device for the best experience.

benefitsList.title: Continuous Support
benefitsList.description: Hosting, maintenance, and updates included. We handle everything so you can focus on your business.

professionalWebsites.featuresSubtitle: We use the most modern and proven tech stack on the market

features.title: Clean & Maintainable Code
features.description: React, TypeScript, and modern architecture. Your site will grow with you without technical issues.

features.title: Guaranteed Security
features.description: HTTPS, attack protection, automatic backups — your website and data are always safe.

features.title: Integrated Analytics
features.description: Measure performance from day one. Know exactly what’s working and what to improve.

professionalWebsites.processSubtitle: From concept to production in record time

processSteps.title: Discovery
processSteps.description: We analyze your business, goals, and target audience to define the project scope and required features.

processSteps.title: Design & UX
processSteps.description: We create custom wireframes and designs focused on user experience and conversion.

processSteps.title: Development
processSteps.description: We build with clean code, perform continuous testing, and deliver iteratively for your feedback.

processSteps.title: Launch
processSteps.description: Optimized deployment, SEO setup, analytics, and training so you can manage your website easily.

professionalWebsites.whyChooseText: Our websites aren’t modified WordPress or Wix templates. They’re hand-crafted projects built with the latest technologies. The result: sites that load in under 2 seconds, rank on Google from day one, and convey professional trust from the first click. No technical limitations, no bloat, no plugin dependencies. Your site, your code, your ownership.
professionalWebsites.ctaText: Let’s talk about your project. You’ll get a personalized proposal within 48 hours.

fullStackDevelopment.name: Custom Web Apps
fullStackDevelopment.description: Complete custom platforms and applications, from concept to production
fullStackDevelopment.keywords: full stack development, web applications, SaaS development, React, TypeScript, Node.js, custom software
fullStackDevelopment.whatWeDoText: We develop complete web applications (frontend + backend) from scratch. From internal management platforms to scalable public SaaS. We don't use templates or generic solutions: each project is unique, designed specifically to solve your business problems. Scalable architecture, maintainable code, and cutting-edge technology (React, TypeScript, Node.js).

projectTypes.title: Internal Management Platforms
projectTypes.description: Custom CRMs, tailored ERPs, control dashboards, inventory systems. Everything you need to manage your operation.

projectTypes.title: SaaS & Digital Products
projectTypes.description: Multi-tenant applications, subscription systems, payment platforms, third-party APIs. Your product ready to sell.

projectTypes.title: Complex Integrations
projectTypes.description: Connect multiple systems (ERPs, CRMs, external APIs). Data synchronization, webhooks, microservices architectures.

projectTypes.title: Analytics Applications
projectTypes.description: Interactive dashboards, data visualization, automated reports, custom business intelligence.

fullStackDevelopment.benefitsSubtitle: We don't sell code, we sell solutions that work

benefitsList.title: 100% Custom Solution
benefitsList.description: Every line of code written for your specific case. No template limitations, no features you don't need. Your application, exactly as you need it.

benefitsList.title: Scalable & Maintainable Architecture
benefitsList.description: Designed to grow with you. Clean, documented code with automated tests. When you need to add features, it will be easy and fast.

benefitsList.title: Modern Technology Stack
benefitsList.description: React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL/MongoDB. Proven technologies with active community and available developers in the market.

benefitsList.title: Complete Code Ownership
benefitsList.description: All source code is yours. No dependency on us. You can modify it, extend it, or hire another team in the future without problems.

fullStackDevelopment.featuresSubtitle: Modern, proven technologies with a future

features.title: Modern Frontend
features.description: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. Fast, responsive, and intuitive interfaces that your users will love.

features.title: Robust Backend
features.description: Node.js, Express, RESTful APIs. Scalable architecture ready to handle load and grow without limits.

features.title: Efficient Database
features.description: PostgreSQL or MongoDB depending on your case. Optimized design, automatic backups, efficient queries.

fullStackDevelopment.processSubtitle: Transparent process with partial deliveries and constant feedback

processSteps.title: Discovery & Design
processSteps.description: We understand your business, users, and goals. Wireframes, user flows, and architecture design.

processSteps.title: Functional MVP
processSteps.description: We develop initial version with core functionalities. You test it, give feedback, we iterate.

processSteps.title: Full Development
processSteps.description: We add all planned functionalities. Continuous testing, weekly deliveries.

processSteps.title: Deploy & Training
processSteps.description: We deploy to production, configure analytics, train your team, and deliver documentation.

fullStackDevelopment.whyChooseText: We are senior developers with real experience in complex projects. We're not an agency that outsources: you talk directly with who programs your application. Transparent communication, fast deliveries, and professional-quality code you can maintain without us. We've developed from CRMs for sales teams to SaaS platforms with thousands of users. We know the challenges, common mistakes, and how to avoid them.
fullStackDevelopment.ctaText: Have a web application idea? Tell us about your project and we'll give you a detailed plan with timeline and budget in less than 48 hours.

onDemandTeam.name: Tech Reinforcement
onDemandTeam.description: Development reinforcement when your team needs it, available within 48 hours.
onDemandTeam.keywords: on-demand developers, tech team, software outsourcing, temporary developers, IT support, remote development
onDemandTeam.whatWeDoText: We provide senior developers to strengthen your team for urgent deliveries, high workloads, or tight deadlines. We integrate into your workflow immediately, with no learning curve. Flexible billing, no long-term contracts.
onDemandTeam.urgencyTitle: Urgent Delivery? We Can Start NOW
onDemandTeam.urgencyText: If your project has a critical deadline and needs immediate technical reinforcement, we can start tomorrow. No bureaucracy, no long processes.
onDemandTeam.useCasesTitle: When Do You Need Our Team?
onDemandTeam.useCasesSubtitle: Real situations where we’ve made the difference

useCases.title: Critical Deadline Delivery
useCases.description: You promised delivery next week and your team can’t make it. We step in, prioritize, and deliver on time.

useCases.title: Unexpected Workload Peak
useCases.description: New project approved, multiple clients at once, your team is overloaded. We join temporarily until the load stabilizes.

useCases.title: Specific Expertise Required
useCases.description: You need a TypeScript, React, or Node.js specialist for a specific module. We build, test, and document it.

useCases.title: Vacation Coverage
useCases.description: Your key developer goes on vacation mid-project. We cover the position seamlessly.

onDemandTeam.benefitsSubtitle: We’re not a generic outsourcing hub — we’re real developers

benefitsList.title: Available in 48 Hours
benefitsList.description: No lengthy recruitment processes. Call today, start in two days. We’re fully set up and ready to work.

benefitsList.title: Senior Specialized Developers
benefitsList.description: No juniors learning on your budget. Only developers with 5+ years of real experience in your tech stack.

benefitsList.title: Immediate Integration
benefitsList.description: We work with Git, Jira, Slack, Teams — whatever you use. We adapt to your flow, not the other way around.

benefitsList.title: Flexible Billing
benefitsList.description: Per day, project, or sprint. Whatever works best for you. No long-term commitments or hidden clauses.

onDemandTeam.featuresSubtitle: Modern, proven stack used in real projects

features.title: Frontend
features.description: React, Next.js, Angular, TypeScript

features.title: Backend
features.description: Node.js, NestJS, .NET, Java Spring

features.title: Cloud
features.description: Azure, AWS, Vercel, Docker

processSteps.title: 30-Min Call
processSteps.description: Tell us your situation: what you need, for when, and your tech stack. We assess if and how we can help.

processSteps.title: Proposal in 24h
processSteps.description: We send a proposal including: developer profile, availability, daily/project rate, and start date.

processSteps.title: Immediate Start
processSteps.description: Access granted, onboarding in hours, first commit within 48h. Daily updates on progress.

onDemandTeam.whyChooseText: We understand the pressure of deadlines. We’ve rescued multiple projects in their final weeks when everything seemed lost. We’re not an offshore team you’ll only meet on Zoom — we’re local developers in your timezone, same language, same culture. Real technical expertise, proven speed, and absolute commitment to your deadlines.
onDemandTeam.ctaText: Does your team need reinforcement now? Let’s talk today — we can start tomorrow.

legacyMigration.name: Legacy Migration & Modernization
legacyMigration.description: Transform your legacy software into modern applications without disrupting operations.
legacyMigration.keywords: legacy migration, software modernization, refactoring, digital transformation, system upgrade, old software replacement
legacyMigration.whatWeDoText: We migrate outdated systems to modern technologies — from old CLI apps to unmaintainable monoliths. We conduct a detailed analysis, design a phased migration strategy, and execute with minimal impact on your daily operations.
legacyMigration.useCasesSubtitle: Real examples where we’ve transformed legacy systems

useCases.title: Monolith to Modular Architecture
useCases.description: We transformed a legacy PHP monolith into scalable, maintainable Node.js microservices.

useCases.title: CLI to Web Migration
useCases.description: We turned command-line internal tools into modern, secure web platforms.

useCases.title: Legacy Database Upgrade
useCases.description: Migrated data from SQL Server 2008 and Oracle to PostgreSQL with zero downtime.

useCases.title: Progressive Modernization
useCases.description: We evolve critical modules step-by-step, keeping your business running at all times.

legacyMigration.benefitsSubtitle: Modernize your infrastructure without disrupting your business

benefitsList.title: Reduced Costs
benefitsList.description: Lower maintenance, fewer incidents, and less dependency on outdated tech.

benefitsList.title: Superior Performance
benefitsList.description: New systems are faster, safer, and scalable from day one.

benefitsList.title: Maintainable, Documented Code
benefitsList.description: We implement modern standards and clear documentation for future growth.

benefitsList.title: Zero Downtime Migration
benefitsList.description: We migrate in phases, ensuring business continuity throughout the process.

legacyMigration.featuresSubtitle: We upgrade your stack using modern, proven tools

features.title: Modern Frontend
features.description: React, Next.js, TypeScript

features.title: Updated Backend
features.description: Node.js, NestJS, .NET Core, Java Spring Boot

features.title: Databases
features.description: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL Server, MySQL

features.title: Infrastructure
features.description: Docker, Azure, AWS, CI/CD Pipelines

legacyMigration.processSubtitle: A structured process designed to minimize risk and maximize success

processSteps.title: System Audit
processSteps.description: We analyze your current environment, dependencies, and technical challenges.

processSteps.title: Migration Strategy
processSteps.description: We design a phased plan that prioritizes stability and compatibility.

processSteps.title: Migration & Validation
processSteps.description: We execute, test, and validate every step to ensure smooth transition.

processSteps.title: Optimization & Support
processSteps.description: We fine-tune performance and provide post-deployment support to guarantee success.

legacyMigration.whyChooseText: We have real experience in complex migrations — from CLI to Web, from old .NET to Node.js, from legacy databases to cloud environments. We understand the risks and know how to mitigate them. Your current challenge can become our next success story.
legacyMigration.ctaText: Is your legacy system holding you back? Let’s design your modernization plan today.

automation.name: Process Automation
automation.description: Save time and reduce errors by automating repetitive business tasks.
automation.keywords: automation, RPA, process robots, efficiency, error reduction, integrations, bots, scripts, productivity
automation.whatWeDoText: We identify manual, time-consuming processes in your organization and automate them — from tool integrations to complex workflows. We build custom scripts, intelligent bots, and RPA solutions tailored to your business needs.

useCases.title: Automated Reporting
useCases.description: Automatically generate and send daily or weekly reports with up-to-date data from multiple sources.

useCases.title: Order & Invoice Management
useCases.description: Bots that process orders, validate invoices, and update ERP or CRM systems in real time.

useCases.title: Tool Integration
useCases.description: We connect platforms like Slack, Google Workspace, SAP, or Notion through automated workflows.

useCases.title: Backoffice RPA
useCases.description: We automate repetitive tasks like data entry, validation, or information transfers.

automation.benefitsSubtitle: Boost productivity by eliminating unnecessary manual work

benefitsList.title: ROI in Less Than 6 Months
benefitsList.description: Save time and resources — the investment pays off quickly.

benefitsList.title: Error Reduction
benefitsList.description: Automated processes minimize human mistakes and increase accuracy.

benefitsList.title: Higher Productivity
benefitsList.description: Your team can focus on strategic tasks while bots handle repetitive work.

benefitsList.title: Seamless Integration
benefitsList.description: We design automation that fits perfectly with your existing tools.

features.title: RPA Tools
features.description: UiPath, Power Automate, Automation Anywhere

features.title: Integrations
features.description: Zapier, n8n, Make (Integromat)

features.title: Scripting & Bots
features.description: Node.js, Python, Puppeteer, Selenium

features.title: Cloud Workflows
features.description: AWS Lambda, Google Cloud Functions, Azure Logic Apps

automation.processSubtitle: From process detection to tangible results

processSteps.title: Process Analysis
processSteps.description: We identify manual tasks, timings, and automation opportunities.

processSteps.title: Solution Design
processSteps.description: We define flows, tools, and optimal integration points.

processSteps.title: Development & Implementation
processSteps.description: We build, test, and integrate the automation into your environment.

processSteps.title: Monitoring & Scaling
processSteps.description: We monitor performance and scale automation progressively.

automation.whyChooseText: We don’t sell generic automation. We analyze your real operations and build specific solutions that generate immediate savings. We focus on measurable outcomes — fewer errors, higher efficiency, and fast ROI.
automation.ctaText: Is your team wasting time on repetitive tasks? Automate them and boost productivity today.

aiSolutions.name: Applied Artificial Intelligence
aiSolutions.description: Assistants, chatbots and AI agents that understand your business and work with your real information.
aiSolutions.keywords: artificial intelligence, AI, LLM, GPT, chatbot, AI assistant, RAG, agents, OpenAI, Anthropic, smart automation
aiSolutions.whatWeDoText: We design and ship business-grade AI solutions: chatbots that know your products, assistants that answer using your internal documentation, agents that execute complex tasks, and automatic analysis of unstructured data. We work with leading models (OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source models) and connect to your existing systems.
aiSolutions.benefitsSubtitle: It's not magic — it's freeing your team from cognitive tasks a well-built assistant handles in seconds

benefitsList.title: 24/7 support without scaling headcount
benefitsList.description: Your chatbot handles customer queries at any hour and escalates only the cases that really need a human.

benefitsList.title: Your knowledge, instantly accessible
benefitsList.description: Manuals, contracts, FAQs and internal policies: your team asks in natural language and gets precise answers citing the source.

benefitsList.title: Analysis of unstructured data
benefitsList.description: Emails, tickets, reviews or contracts: AI extracts patterns, sentiment and recommended actions without anyone reading them one by one.

benefitsList.title: Agents that execute, not just chat
benefitsList.description: Beyond chat: agents that update your CRM, generate reports, schedule meetings or trigger workflows with the right context.

aiSolutions.featuresSubtitle: Applied AI at the detail level, no black boxes

features.title: Leading models
features.description: We work with OpenAI, Anthropic and open-source models when privacy demands it.

features.title: RAG over your data
features.description: The assistant answers using only your real documentation, not generic internet knowledge.

features.title: Full traceability
features.description: Every answer cites its source and is logged for audit.

aiSolutions.processSubtitle: From use case to production in weeks, not months

processSteps.title: Concrete use case
processSteps.description: We identify the flow where AI adds the most value: support, sales, HR or operations.

processSteps.title: Prototype in 2 weeks
processSteps.description: We build an MVP with your real data so you see results before investing more.

processSteps.title: Integration with your systems
processSteps.description: We connect the assistant with your CRM, database, ERP or whichever channel you need.

processSteps.title: Monitoring and improvement
processSteps.description: Usage metrics, continuous prompt tuning and training with real feedback.

aiSolutions.whyChooseText: We don't sell 'AI' as a buzzword. We design specific solutions that solve a concrete operational problem, with clear metrics and your data privacy as a priority. If AI isn't the answer, we'll tell you.
aiSolutions.ctaText: Got a repetitive process or an AI use case in mind? Tell us the context and we'll let you know whether it makes sense and how to tackle it.

mobileApps.name: Bespoke Mobile Apps
mobileApps.description: Native and cross-platform applications for iOS and Android, built to scale and last over time.
mobileApps.keywords: mobile apps, iOS development, Android development, React Native, Swift, Kotlin, custom app, mobile application
mobileApps.whatWeDoText: We build mobile apps from scratch or evolve the ones you already have. We work both native (Swift for iOS, Kotlin for Android) and cross-platform with React Native when the case justifies it. We design for performance, accessibility and long-term maintainability — not just for launch day.
mobileApps.benefits: Why a custom app over a template
mobileApps.benefitsSubtitle: Your business has unique flows. A template forces you to adapt your operation to the product, not the other way around.

benefitsList.title: Real performance, not demo performance
benefitsList.description: We optimize every screen so the app works just as well with 100 records as with 100,000.

benefitsList.title: Offline-first when you need it
benefitsList.description: Smart sync so your app works without connection and reconciles data when the network comes back.

benefitsList.title: Relevant push notifications
benefitsList.description: Segmented, contextual push — not spam. Open and conversion metrics built in.

benefitsList.title: Maintainable years out
benefitsList.description: Documented code, automated tests and architecture ready to grow without rewrites.

mobileApps.featuresSubtitle: Tech choices that back up the engineering decision

features.title: Native when it matters
features.description: Swift and Kotlin for apps with performance requirements or intensive hardware use (camera, GPS, sensors).

features.title: React Native for speed
features.description: One codebase for both platforms when time-to-market matters and the app is reasonably standard.

features.title: App Store + Play Store
features.description: We handle the full publishing process, reviews and updates.

mobileApps.processSubtitle: Two-week sprints with a demo at the end of each one

processSteps.title: Discovery and prototype
processSteps.description: Key flows validated in a clickable prototype before writing code.

processSteps.title: MVP in 8-12 weeks
processSteps.description: Working version with the critical flows ready for real user testing.

processSteps.title: Iteration with feedback
processSteps.description: We refine what usage data shows actually matters, not what we assumed at the start.

processSteps.title: Launch and operation
processSteps.description: Release on both stores and ongoing support if you need it.

mobileApps.whyChooseText: We're not an agency that delivers and disappears. We design every app thinking about who's going to maintain it three years from now — usually us, so we set a high bar on code, tests and documentation.

guarantees.text: Publishing on App Store and Play Store

mobileApps.ctaText: Got an app idea or want to modernize an existing one? We'll tell you within 24h whether native or cross-platform is the right call for your case.

ecommerce.name: Custom E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Fast online stores, optimized for conversion and built to sell — with or without a traditional payment gateway.
ecommerce.keywords: ecommerce, online store, online sales, Stripe, Shopify, headless commerce, payment gateway, WooCommerce, shopping cart
ecommerce.whatWeDoText: We build custom online stores. From catalogs with WhatsApp checkout (no gateway fees) to headless platforms with Stripe, Shopify or WooCommerce. We design for speed and conversion: every step of the funnel is built so the customer completes the purchase.
ecommerce.benefits: Why your store deserves more than a template
ecommerce.benefitsSubtitle: Every decimal of conversion counts. A generic store limits you exactly where you shouldn't be limited.

benefitsList.title: Speed that sells
benefitsList.description: Every extra second of load time costs you conversion. We optimize performance to the last kilobyte.

benefitsList.title: Friction-free checkout
benefitsList.description: Fewer steps, fewer fields, more conversion. We design the buying flow to minimize abandonment.

benefitsList.title: No per-sale fees (optional)
benefitsList.description: WhatsApp or email checkout for small businesses that don't want to give up a % to Stripe or PayPal.

benefitsList.title: Real inventory integration
benefitsList.description: If you have an ERP, POS or inventory system, we connect them so stock and prices are always in sync.

ecommerce.featuresSubtitle: We pick the stack based on your business, not the other way around

features.title: Headless or all-in-one
features.description: Headless Shopify when you want full flexibility, or classic WooCommerce/Shopify when you prefer simplicity.

features.title: Gateways you choose
features.description: Stripe, PayPal, Redsys, Bizum or WhatsApp checkout. Every business has its own.

features.title: Multi-language and multi-currency
features.description: If you sell outside your country, the store adapts to the visitor's language and currency.

ecommerce.processSubtitle: Catalog, checkout and metrics ready before going loud

processSteps.title: Strategy and stack
processSteps.description: We decide together on gateway, hosting, integrations and management model.

processSteps.title: Design and catalog
processSteps.description: Product template, categories, navigation and technical SEO from day one.

processSteps.title: Checkout and metrics
processSteps.description: Optimized buying flow and analytics built in to measure every step of the funnel.

processSteps.title: Launch and support
processSteps.description: Data migration if you come from another platform, training for your team and post-launch support.

ecommerce.whyChooseText: We sell stores that sell. We care about conversion, AOV and CAC much more than showing you the latest technology. Every technical decision is justified by the impact on your P&L.
ecommerce.ctaText: Want to launch a new store or improve the conversion of your existing one? We start with a quick no-commitment audit.

support.name: Continuous Support and Maintenance
support.description: Dedicated squad that knows your product and responds with clear SLAs. So your platform evolves without surprises.
support.keywords: software maintenance, technical support, SLA, dedicated team, product evolution, monitoring, observability, hotfix
support.whatWeDoText: We keep alive the products we deliver — both ours and third-party ones. Dedicated squad that knows your code, proactive monitoring, SLA-backed hotfixes and a quarterly evolution roadmap shared with you. Technical stability as a commitment, not as reactivity.
support.benefitsSubtitle: A product without maintenance is an asset that depreciates every month

benefitsList.title: Knowledge that doesn't get lost
benefitsList.description: Your dedicated squad knows the code, the architecture decisions and the business context. You don't start from scratch with every change.

benefitsList.title: Real, auditable SLAs
benefitsList.description: Measured response and resolution times, with transparent monthly reports. You know exactly what you're paying for.

benefitsList.title: Quarterly evolution roadmap
benefitsList.description: We don't just put out fires: we propose performance, security and UX improvements every quarter.

benefitsList.title: Observability stack included
benefitsList.description: Datadog, Sentry, PagerDuty and similar configured from day one. We detect problems before your users do.

support.featuresSubtitle: Full support, not patch by patch

features.title: SLA-backed hotfixes
features.description: Immediate response to critical incidents, with priority based on agreed severity.

features.title: Continuous evolution
features.description: Quarterly planned improvements aligned with your business roadmap.

features.title: Security updates
features.description: Dependencies, patches and security audits handled proactively.

support.processSubtitle: A predictable model so support stops being a hidden cost

processSteps.title: Technical onboarding
processSteps.description: Code audit, monitoring setup and operational documentation.

processSteps.title: Agreed SLAs
processSteps.description: We define together response times and priorities based on business impact.

processSteps.title: Day-to-day operation
processSteps.description: Slack or dedicated channel, transparent ticketing and response within SLA.

processSteps.title: Quarterly review
processSteps.description: Incident report, next-quarter roadmap and model adjustment if needed.

support.whyChooseText: We care that the product keeps working three years from now just like it did the day we launched it. We don't sell hours, we sell commitment: if something breaks, we fix it. If something can be improved, we propose it.
support.ctaText: Does your product need serious maintenance or do you have an inherited one without a tech team behind it? Let's talk about the right model for you.

about.title: About ATEP Consulting
about.subtitle: Empowering businesses through innovative technology solutions
about.value1Text: We are always by your side. We provide proactive and continuous support, guaranteeing a smooth implementation and the efficient achievement of your goals.
about.value2Text: We build every relationship on trust. We maintain open communication and clear processes to ensure an honest and complete vision at every phase
about.value3Text: We exceed the standard in every solution. Our commitment to quality and expert knowledge drives us to deliver results that surpass expectations
about.value4Text: We act with the highest rigor and ethics. We adhere to the industry's highest standards, ensuring seriousness, responsibility, and respectful treatment
about.missionText: We are committed to helping businesses navigate the complexities of digital transformation. Our mission is to deliver innovative, practical solutions that drive growth and create lasting value for our clients.
about.visionText: To be the trusted partner for businesses seeking to modernize their operations and embrace digital innovation. We envision a future where technology empowers every organization to reach its full potential.
about.teamSubtitle: Meet the people behind our success

gabriela.name: Gabriela Albertini
gabriela.bio: With over 15 years of experience in technology consulting, Gabriela leads ATEP Consulting's strategic vision. Her expertise in digital transformation has helped numerous companies achieve operational excellence.

pablo.name: Pablo Teijeiro
pablo.bio: Pablo brings deep technical expertise and a passion for innovation. As CTO, he oversees all technology implementations and ensures our solutions leverage the latest industry best practices.

blog.title: Digital Sector Trends
blog.subtitle: Insights, tips, and the latest trends in digital transformation and consulting
blog.ctaSubtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter and never miss an article
blog.noResults: No articles found. Try adjusting your filters.

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
contact.subtitle: We're here to help you transform your business. Fill out the form or contact us directly.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours
contact.availabilityText: We're available around the clock to assist you. Reach out anytime, and we'll respond as quickly as possible.
contact.followText: Stay updated with our latest news and insights
contact.urgentText: Call us directly for instant support
contact.gdprRequired: You must accept the privacy policy
contact.gdprText1: I have read and accept the
contact.gdprText2: and the processing of my personal data
contact.gdprNote: Your data will be processed according to our privacy policy

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ATEP Consulting, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.responsibleText: The data controller responsible for your personal information is:
privacy.collectionText: We collect the following types of personal information:
privacy.collectionItem1: Identification data: name, surname, email address, phone number
privacy.collectionItem2: Navigation data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, access time
privacy.collectionItem3: Professional data: company, position, sector of activity
privacy.collectionItem4: Any other information you voluntarily provide through our contact forms
privacy.purposeText: We use your personal information for the following purposes:
privacy.purposeItem1: Respond to your inquiries and provide requested information
privacy.purposeItem2: Manage and provide our consulting services
privacy.purposeItem3: Send commercial communications about our services (with your prior consent)
privacy.purposeItem4: Improve our website and user experience
privacy.legalBasisText: The legal basis for processing your data is your explicit consent when filling out our contact forms, as well as the execution of a contractual relationship for the provision of our services.
privacy.retentionText: We will retain your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. Contact data will be retained for up to 2 years from the last interaction, unless you request their deletion.
privacy.recipientsText: Your data may be shared with the following recipients:
privacy.recipientsItem1: Email service providers (e.g., EmailJS) for sending communications
privacy.recipientsItem2: Hosting and cloud services providers for data storage
privacy.recipientsItem3: Legal, tax, and professional advisors when necessary
privacy.rightsText: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
privacy.rightsItem1: Right of access: to know what data we have about you
privacy.rightsItem2: Right to rectification: to correct inaccurate data
privacy.rightsItem3: Right to erasure: to request deletion of your data
privacy.rightsItem4: Right to restriction: to limit the processing of your data
privacy.rightsItem5: Right to data portability: to receive your data in a structured format
privacy.rightsItem6: Right to object: to oppose certain processing of your data
privacy.rightsItem7: Right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD)
privacy.rightsExercise: To exercise these rights, please contact us at info@atepconsulting.com, including proof of your identity.
privacy.protectionText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits.
privacy.cookiesText: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. For more information about the cookies we use and how to manage them, please visit our Cookies Policy.
privacy.thirdPartyText: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We recommend reviewing their privacy policies before providing any personal information.
privacy.modificationsText: We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated 'Last Updated' date. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.
privacy.contactText: For questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, please contact us at

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookies Policy explains how ATEP Consulting uses cookies and similar technologies on our website to enhance your experience and provide our services.
cookies.whatAreText: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They allow the website to remember your actions and preferences over a period of time, so you don't have to reconfigure them every time you visit the site or browse from one page to another.
cookies.howWeUseText: We use cookies to understand how you interact with our website, remember your preferences, analyze traffic, and improve our services. This allows us to provide you with a personalized and efficient experience on our website.
cookies.essentialDesc: These are essential for the website to function properly. Without these cookies, certain services cannot be provided.
cookies.essentialExamples: Session cookies, security cookies, language cookies
cookies.analyticsDesc: These allow us to analyze how users use the website and monitor site performance. All information is anonymous.
cookies.analyticsExamples: Google Analytics, visit statistics, most visited pages
cookies.preferenceDesc: These allow the website to remember information that changes how the site behaves or looks, such as your preferred language.
cookies.thirdPartyText: In addition to our own cookies, we may use third-party cookies for various purposes:
cookies.thirdPartyItem1: Google Analytics: To analyze website usage and improve our services
cookies.thirdPartyItem2: EmailJS: To manage contact form submissions
cookies.controlText: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies that are already on your device and you can set most browsers to prevent them from being installed. However, if you do this, you may have to manually adjust some preferences each time you visit the site and some services and features may not work properly.
cookies.chromeInstructions: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies and other site data
cookies.firefoxInstructions: Options > Privacy & Security > Cookies and Site Data
cookies.edgeInstructions: Settings > Cookies and site permissions > Manage and delete cookies
cookies.acceptanceText: By continuing to browse our website without changing your browser's cookie settings, you accept the use of cookies as described in this policy. You can withdraw your consent at any time by changing your browser settings.
cookies.updatesText: We may update this Cookies Policy periodically to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. Please review this page regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies.
cookies.contactText: If you have questions about our Cookies Policy, please contact us at

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.intro: In compliance with Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), ATEP Consulting informs website users about the following legal aspects.
legal.identificationText: The identification data of the website owner are:
legal.purposeText: This website aims to provide information about the consulting services offered by ATEP Consulting, as well as facilitate contact between the company and its potential clients. Access to and use of the website grants user status and implies full acceptance of all conditions included in this Legal Notice.
legal.accessConditionsText: Access to and use of this website implies acceptance of the following conditions:
legal.accessItem1: The user agrees to make proper use of the website and its contents, in accordance with current legislation and this Legal Notice.
legal.accessItem2: The user agrees not to use the website for unlawful purposes or purposes harmful to ATEP Consulting or third parties.
legal.accessItem3: Any use of the website that may cause damage, disable, overload, or deteriorate it or prevent its normal use is prohibited.
legal.accessItem4: The user may not introduce programs, viruses, macros, applets, ActiveX controls, or any other logical device that may cause alterations to the website.
legal.intellectualPropertyText: All website content, including, without limitation, texts, photographs, graphics, images, icons, technology, software, links, and other audiovisual or sound content, as well as its graphic design and source codes, are the intellectual property of ATEP Consulting or third parties, without any exploitation rights recognized by current intellectual property regulations being transferred to the user. Reproduction, distribution, public communication, transformation, or any other form of exploitation of the content without prior written authorization from ATEP Consulting is prohibited.
legal.liabilityText: ATEP Consulting is not responsible for:
legal.liabilityItem1: The quality of service, access speed, correct operation, availability, or continuity of the website.
legal.liabilityItem2: Errors or inaccuracies that may be found in the website content.
legal.liabilityItem3: Damages that may arise from unlawful or improper use of the website by users.
legal.externalLinksText: The website may contain links to third-party websites. ATEP Consulting assumes no responsibility for the content, accuracy, or operation of such websites. Access to and use of them will be at the user's sole responsibility.
legal.dataProtectionText: ATEP Consulting is committed to protecting user privacy. For more information on how we process your personal data, please see our
legal.applicableLegislationText: These conditions are governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any conflict that may arise on the occasion of visiting the website or using the services that may be offered on it, ATEP Consulting and the user agree to submit to the Courts and Tribunals of the user's domicile. In the event that the user is domiciled outside Spain, ATEP Consulting and the user submit, with express waiver of any other jurisdiction, to the courts and tribunals of the city where ATEP Consulting has its registered office.
legal.modificationsText: ATEP Consulting reserves the right to make modifications it deems appropriate to its website without prior notice, being able to change, delete, or add both the contents and services provided through it as well as the way in which they appear presented or located.
legal.contactText: For any questions related to this Legal Notice, please contact us at
